post.title: The Best Tech Events in Bangalore in 2026
post.author: Eventa Editorial Team
post.excerpt: Discover the top technology conferences, summits, and meetups happening in India's Silicon Valley this year.
post.content:
# The Best Tech Events in Bangalore in 2026

Bangalore remains the undisputed tech capital of India, and 2026 is shaping up to be its biggest year yet for technology events, conferences, and startup summits.

Whether you're a founder looking for seed funding, a developer wanting to upskill in AI, or a product manager building the next big thing, Bangalore has an event for you.

## 1. AI & Beyond Summit
Expected to draw over 5,000 attendees, this summit focuses heavily on applied Generative AI and LLM integration in enterprise software.

## 2. Startup Network Nexus
A must-attend for early-stage founders. Last year, over 50 startups secured seed funding directly from connections made at this event.

## 3. Web3 and Decentralized Future
With crypto regulations becoming clearer, the Web3 space is booming again. This two-day conference features hands-on smart contract workshops.

**Conclusion**
Make sure to book your tickets early, as these premium events tend to sell out months in advance. Keep an eye on Eventa for exclusive early-bird discounts!
